name: brand_guidelines
description: Apply a product team's visual identity rules to generated documents, slides, and UI artifacts.

inputs.brand_tokens: colors, typography, spacing, and usage rules

outputs.styled_artifact: artifact that follows the provided brand guidance

steps: Read the requested artifact type and audience.
Map brand tokens to concrete layout and typography decisions.
Return audit notes for human review.

name: claude_api
description: Convert API documentation into a safe, parameter-complete tool call plan.

inputs.api_doc: endpoint, authentication, parameters, and response schema

outputs.tool_call_plan: endpoint, method, required parameters, optional parameters, and validation notes

steps: Extract endpoint, method, auth, required parameters, and response fields.
Check that every required parameter has a source.
Flag missing or unsafe values instead of guessing.

name: docx
description: Transform a document editing request into a structured DOCX workflow with render verification.

outputs.workflow: steps for creating, editing, rendering, and checking a DOCX file

steps: Generate or edit the DOCX content.
Report layout or formatting issues before final delivery.

name: frontend_design
description: Convert a frontend feature request into an implementation plan with UI states and verification steps.

inputs.existing_design_system: components, colors, typography, and layout constraints

outputs.ui_plan: screens, states, controls, and validation steps

steps: Reuse existing components and layout conventions.
Specify empty, loading, success, and error states.
Verify responsive behavior and text fit.
